mapper.select: SELECT VALUE_NAME FROM NIA.TB_LINKAGE_SEQ WHERE KEY_NAME = #{keyName}

insert.if:
INSERT INTO IP_YD.XE_SFLOW_LOG ( INTINDEX, STRRESIP, STRRESNAME, STRRANK, STRS_IP, STRS_PORT, STRD_IP, STRD_PORT, STRS_MAC, STRD_MAC, STRPROTOCOL, STRIPV4TOS, STRCHANNEL, STRIP, STRPORT, STRMAC, STRINTERFACE, STRSENDERIP, STRIN_INTERFACE, STROUT_INTERFACE, STRBYTES, STRUNIT, DATEREGDATE ) VALUES
( #{item.intIndex}, #{item.strResIP}, #{item.strResName}, #{item.strRank}, #{item.strSIP}, #{item.strSPORT}, #{item.strDIP}, #{item.strDPORT}, #{item.strSMAC}, #{item.strDMAC}, #{item.strProtocol}, #{item.strIPv4ToS}, #{item.strChannel}, #{item.strIP}, #{item.strPort}, #{item.strMAC}, #{item.strInterface}, #{item.strSenderIP}, #{item.strInInterface}, #{item.strOutInterface}, #{item.strBytes}, #{item.strUnit}, #{item.dateRegDate} )

mapper.update: UPDATE NIA.TB_LINKAGE_SEQ SET VALUE_NAME = #{value}, YD_DATE = now() WHERE KEY_NAME = #{key}
